goal: Deeply review current game loop risks and produce a practical optimization brief with external reference materials from the web.
constraints: Do not modify gameplay/runtime code in this task.
Use factual current project findings and external references with source links.
Recommendations must map to current known issues: match non-termination risk and AI win-rate calibration.
deliverables: A project-facing analysis document with prioritized fixes and acceptance metrics.
A curated reference list with direct links and how each source applies to this project.
